command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute 
-- All subscriptions with dates
SELECT 
  plan, status, 
  DATE(createdAt) as created,
  DATE(canceledAt) as canceled
FROM subscriptions
ORDER BY createdAt;

-- Users with active subscriptions
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as active_subscribers FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'active';

-- Credit transactions summary
SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(amount) as net_credits FROM creditTransactions GROUP BY type;

-- Total credits currently held by users
SELECT SUM(balance) as total_credit_balance, SUM(topupCredits) as topup_credits, SUM(monthlyCredits) as monthly_credits FROM credits;
